hero.label: Video editing agency · Infopreneurs & Creators
hero.subtitle: You film. We edit, we deliver, you publish. While your content runs, you scale.

portfolio.label: PORTFOLIO
portfolio.subtitle: Every video is built to drive engagement, trust, and sales.

freelance.label: COMPARISON
freelance.h2_part1: Going solo or with a freelancer?
freelance.f1: Unpredictable availability — gone when you need them
freelance.f2: You spend an hour briefing before every single video
freelance.f4: One person. One skill set. One style.
freelance.f6: You chase files, feedback loops, and missed deadlines
freelance.i1: A dedicated team, available 5 days a week
freelance.i2: We learn your style from day one — no re-briefing
freelance.i4: Editors, motion designers, reviewers — all in one
freelance.i5: Flat monthly rate — predictable, no surprises
freelance.i6: You send your footage. We handle everything else.
freelance.arg1_desc: Your videos ship when you need them. Not when someone gets around to it.
freelance.arg2_desc: After 3 videos, we know your intros, your cuts, your music. Zero repeated briefing.
freelance.arg3_desc: Editing, motion, captions, thumbnails. One team. Zero coordination on your end.

eco.label: THE ECOSYSTEM
eco.subtitle: Not just an editor. A complete content creation system, ready to run.
eco.card1_desc: Footage, assets, photos, audio — all in one place, full quality. You drop it, we handle it. No more WeTransfer, no more lost files.
eco.card2_desc: Real-time production tracking. Editorial calendar. Script database linked to everything. You always know exactly where each video stands.
eco.card3_desc: A private channel with your editor and the team. Questions, approvals, feedback — one place. Same-day response, always.

process.label: HOW IT WORKS
process.subtitle: A workflow designed so you spend less than 10 minutes per video. We handle the rest.
process.row1_toi_sub: Your phone, your space. No studio needed.
process.row2_toi_sub: One upload. No emails, no 12-page briefs.
process.row2_irys_sub: Captions, motion, colour, sound design. Your brand style on every video.
process.row3_toi_sub: Right on the Frame.io timeline. Click the exact moment — we get the timecode instantly.
process.row3_irys_sub: Video ready in your space. Track progress live on Notion.
process.row4_irys_sub: On your channels, on your schedule. Right day, right time, right platform.
process.step1_title: You film and upload your footage
process.step1_sub: Your phone, your space. One upload to Frame.io. No email, no 12-page brief.
process.step2_title: We edit your video start to finish
process.step2_sub: Captions, motion design, colour, sound design. Your brand style applied to every video.
process.step3_title: You leave feedback on the timeline
process.step3_sub: Click the exact moment in Frame.io. We get the timecode instantly. Zero hassle.
process.step4_title: We publish on your editorial calendar
process.step4_sub: Right day, right time, right platform. Instagram · TikTok · YouTube. Your last step: approve.

offres.label: PRICING
offres.subtitle: Pick your level of commitment — we adapt. All prices exclude VAT.
offres.cta_help: Not sure which plan fits you?
offres.premium_mention: + animated captions, full SFX, advanced B-roll, soft Motion Design
offres.o1_tag: The bare minimum to flood the algorithms.
offres.o2_tag: The perfect combo: Shorts virality + YouTube retention.
offres.o3_tag: For creators who want to own their niche.
offres.packs_note: Frame.io included in all packs. Notion hub, dedicated Slack and auto-publishing are exclusive to subscriptions.

booking.label: BOOK A CALL
booking.subtitle: Free, no commitment. We figure out together if Irys is the right fit.
booking.team_subtitle: You talk directly to the people who'll work on your content.
booking.kilian_bio: Co-founder of Irys Agency. Expert in virality and video creative direction. 1.7M views in 3 months on his own account. He knows what makes people stay.
booking.quentin_bio: Co-founder of Irys Agency. Content creator and infopreneur. 41,000 views with 300 followers, 6 clients signed in 2 months. He knows our clients' problems because he lived them.
booking.first_video_desc: Send us an idea. We edit it fast. If it's not perfect, you walk away without signing — and you keep the video for free.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: Do I keep control over my videos?
faq.a1: Completely. We set your creative direction together at kick-off, and nothing goes out without your approval. You're still the creator — we're just the team behind you.
faq.q2: What do I need to film with?
faq.a2: Your phone, your usual space. We'll guide you on framing if needed. No studio, no pro gear required.
faq.q3: Do you guarantee views or subscriber growth?
faq.a3: No — and here's why that's the honest answer. No one controls the algorithm. What we do guarantee: quality videos, consistent creative direction, and on-time delivery. That part's on us.
faq.q4: What exactly is the free first video?
faq.a4: Send us an idea or a brief. We edit and deliver. Ask for as many revisions as you want until it's perfect. If you're happy, we sign. If not, you walk away with a free video.
faq.q5: What if I want to cancel?
faq.a5: 30-day notice. That's it. No long-term contract, no penalty. You stay because you're happy — not because you're locked in.
faq.cta: Got a question we missed? Ask us directly →

footer.tagline: The video editing agency for infopreneurs.
